title:
AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PANABO,
PROVINCE OF DAVAO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 12234 / 65 OG No. 23, 5832 (June 9, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5299, June 15, 1968 ]

AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PANABO,

PROVINCE OF DAVAO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:
